titleStmt.title: SII 8.651: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 651. (A.R. No. 342 of 1903). ON THE SAME BASE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .. kovirājakesaripaṉmarkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvati ṉetirāmāṇṭu teṉkarai tevatāṉa brahma teyam Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu śrī Aṟiñcikai ccaturvvedi- maṅkalattu sabhai yom Eṅkaḷūr
kkuḷattil Icaṅkum Oṭattukkāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nila vilaiyāvaṇamā Uṟattūrkkūṟṟattuk koṭumpāḷūrk kaṟkaṭai trai yilokkiyaṉāṉa kotaṇṭarāma mārāyaṉukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu .
Eṅkaḷūr Āttiyuṭaiyāṉcūṟṟu sabhai yppotuvāyk kiṭanta nilam kiḻakkiṉuk kellai tavacikaḷ nilattukkum naṅkaikuṭit tevatāṉattukku merkkum teṟkiṉuk kellai cavaiyomu ceykkum
ṅkoḷḷikaḷ nilattukku vaṭakkum merkkiṉuk kellai Ellaikkallukkuk kiḻakkukkiṟāy Irupatiṉkol nilam viṭṭu Atukkuk kiḻakku vaṭakkuk kellai maturāntakat teṉṉāṟṟiṉ niroṭukālukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta pe
runāṉkellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koṇṭa vilaipporuḷ tiyppokkuc cempoṉ kaḻañciṟ perttatu Ūrāṭukallāṟ poṉ 8 10 � Ippoṉ Eṇpatiṉ kaḻañcum Āvaṇakkaḷiyi
leyk kāccāṟṟik kaiccellakkoṇṭu vilaik kaṟaviṟṟup poru ḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom Aṟiñcikaiccaturvve timaṅkalattu sabhai yom . Ituvey vilaiyāvaṇamum poruḷmāvaṟuti poruṭ celavo
laiyāvatākavum . Ituvalvatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭ celavu kāṭṭakkaṭavaṉallaṉākavum . Ipparicoṭṭi Ippoṉṉukku Innilam viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom kaṟkaṭai trai yilokkiyaṉāṉa kotaṇṭarā
ma mārāyaṉukku Aṟiñcikaiccaturvve timaṅkalattu sabhai yom .
Digital edition of SII 8.651 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
